title: Bucket's Bluer Warped Wood
description: Makes warped wood a nice alternate blue colour
body:
Have you ever wanted your blueish wood to just be regular blue?? Well this is all you need!!

![A showcase of the retextured blue wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1vrodYCC/images/fdadf12ef744af086f845fdbc6f2228d826519fd.png)

_"You're blue now! That's my attack!"_

Note: this pack does NOT replace anything related to the other warped items like nylium, warped wart or warped fungus. This is due to these items not being made of wood
